mapper.sql: select id, user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, self_weight, umbrella_weight, community_weight, previous_community_weight, dividend_weight, settle_status, batch_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, deleted from t_stake_hosting_global_dividend_weight_snapshot
mapper.select: select s.id, s.user_id, s.account, s.week_start_time, s.week_end_time, s.self_weight, s.umbrella_weight, s.community_weight, s.previous_community_weight, s.dividend_weight, s.settle_status, s.batch_no, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark, s.deleted from t_stake_hosting_global_dividend_weight_snapshot s inner join ( select user_id, max(week_start_time) max_week_start_time from t_stake_hosting_global_dividend_weight_snapshot where week_start_time < #{weekStartTime} and deleted = 0 group by user_id ) latest on latest.user_id = s.user_id and latest.max_week_start_time = s.week_start_time where s.deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
insert into t_stake_hosting_global_dividend_weight_snapshot ( user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, self_weight, umbrella_weight, community_weight, previous_community_weight, dividend_weight, settle_status, batch_no, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values
( #{item.userId}, #{item.account}, #{item.weekStartTime}, #{item.weekEndTime}, #{item.selfWeight}, #{item.umbrellaWeight}, #{item.communityWeight}, #{item.previousCommunityWeight}, #{item.dividendWeight}, #{item.settleStatus}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, 0 )
on duplicate key update account = values(account), week_end_time = values(week_end_time), self_weight = values(self_weight), umbrella_weight = values(umbrella_weight), community_weight = values(community_weight), previous_community_weight = values(previous_community_weight), dividend_weight = values(dividend_weight), settle_status = values(settle_status), batch_no = values(batch_no), update_time = values(update_time), deleted = 0
